div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 18px; margin-left: 550px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #050505;
display: inline-block; font-size: 31px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#050505, #e9e9e9); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;
